description: Builds, trains, and deploys machine learning models into production systems. Bridges the gap between data science research and scalable software engineering.
expected_projects: End-to-end ML pipeline: raw data → feature engineering → model → deployed API
Classification or regression model on a real-world dataset with SHAP explainability
Fine-tuned LLM on a domain-specific task (QA, summarization, classification)
Kaggle competition with documented methodology and leaderboard result
Model serving with FastAPI + Dockerized deployment
